channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Breaking News: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist righ…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing Reform UK party, said he would resign as a lawmaker, setting off a special election. The move comes after revelations about gifts and financial support he received.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing Reform UK party, said he would resign as a lawmaker, setting off a special election. The move comes after revelations about gifts and financial support he received.

item.title: トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢 ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじ…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢

ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじゃないね。

#家庭菜園

#家庭菜園

item.title: Nigeria's competition regulator will investigate tech compan…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Nigeria's competition regulator will investigate tech companies over news content use and alleged anti-competitive practices, after complaints by media groups (Tife Owolabi/Reuters)

item.title: トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅 ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアン…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅

ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアンテプのモザイク博物館へ行きたい。

ワタクシ……トラブゾン、リゼからアララト山近く〜ヴァン湖(ヴァン猫)に行きたい。

トルコの東側なのは一致してるけど、北か南かで揉めてる😅
item.content:encoded:
トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅

ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアンテプのモザイク博物館へ行きたい。

ワタクシ……トラブゾン、リゼからアララト山近く〜ヴァン湖(ヴァン猫)に行きたい。

トルコの東側なのは一致してるけど、北か南かで揉めてる😅

item.title: 7月6日（月） #momoポートレート 5月の或る日 【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭 清々しい…
item.author: 桃猫momoneko (@momonekofold.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月6日（月）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

清々しい朝のﾊﾞﾝｺｸ
ﾎﾃﾙの朝食・ﾚｽﾄﾗﾝ、眺めも😄👌
（8枚目は桃猫を探せ!）

LuxuryにActiveにそして
Culture Discoveryな旅でした
ﾊﾞﾝｺｸでは日本企業の進出による
街の活気を感じる一方で
寺院では静かに手を合わせ
寄付をする人々の姿が
印象に残りました

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この旅でのﾊﾞﾝｺｸの気温は…⁈🤔

①36度
②34度
③31度
④29度
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい
item.content:encoded:
7月6日（月）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

清々しい朝のﾊﾞﾝｺｸ
ﾎﾃﾙの朝食・ﾚｽﾄﾗﾝ、眺めも😄👌
（8枚目は桃猫を探せ!）

LuxuryにActiveにそして
Culture Discoveryな旅でした
ﾊﾞﾝｺｸでは日本企業の進出による
街の活気を感じる一方で
寺院では静かに手を合わせ
寄付をする人々の姿が
印象に残りました

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この旅でのﾊﾞﾝｺｸの気温は…⁈🤔

①36度
②34度
③31度
④29度
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい

item.title: 7月10日(金)19：00〜【イベント＆オンライン(Zoom)】 『いろいろ色のはじまり』刊行記念トークイベント 田…
item.author: Mari Hashimoto /橋本麻里 (@malli.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月10日(金)19：00〜【イベント＆オンライン(Zoom)】

『いろいろ色のはじまり』刊行記念トークイベント 田中陵二×橋本麻里　「化学でひも解く絵画の色たち」
store.tsite.jp/daikanyama/e...

山猫だぶさんこと田中陵二さんとは、「日経サイエンス」で北斎の青色に使われた「ベロ藍」ことプルシアンブルーの制作再現をやってみたり、故・吉岡幸雄さんの工房を一緒に訪ねたり、色をめぐる冒険を共にしてきた仲間です。

そんな色をめぐる絵本、福音館『いろいろ色のはじまり』刊行を記念して、二人でがっつり「色」をテーマにお話しします！
item.content:encoded:
7月10日(金)19：00〜【イベント＆オンライン(Zoom)】

『いろいろ色のはじまり』刊行記念トークイベント 田中陵二×橋本麻里　「化学でひも解く絵画の色たち」
store.tsite.jp/daikanyama/e...

山猫だぶさんこと田中陵二さんとは、「日経サイエンス」で北斎の青色に使われた「ベロ藍」ことプルシアンブルーの制作再現をやってみたり、故・吉岡幸雄さんの工房を一緒に訪ねたり、色をめぐる冒険を共にしてきた仲間です。

そんな色をめぐる絵本、福音館『いろいろ色のはじまり』刊行を記念して、二人でがっつり「色」をテーマにお話しします！

item.title: ".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipal…
item.author: Oliver (@oliver48.bsky.social)
item.description:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"
www.facebook.com/groups/29053...
item.content:encoded:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー Windows 11で空き容量が0バイトになる恐れ 影響を確認して速やかに対策を Windows …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
Windows 11で空き容量が0バイトになる恐れ　影響を確認して速やかに対策を

Windows Latestは7月6日(現地時間)、「Microsoft admits a Windows 11 bug is eating up to 500GB of storage, verify if you are affected」において、Windows 11がストレージを勝手に数百GB消費する不具合の影響を受けているかどうかを確認する方法を伝えた。 これはCapabilityAccessManagerサービスのデータベースフ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
Windows 11で空き容量が0バイトになる恐れ　影響を確認して速やかに対策を

Windows Latestは7月6日(現地時間)、「Microsoft admits a Windows 11 bug is eating up to 500GB of storage, verify if you are affected」において、Windows 11がストレージを勝手に数百GB消費する不具合の影響を受けているかどうかを確認する方法を伝えた。 これはCapabilityAccessManagerサービスのデータベースフ...

item.title: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage said on Tuesday he would quit …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage said on Tuesday he would quit as a lawmaker to trigger a by-election in his parliamentary seat and would stand for re-election in that vote.
item.content:encoded: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage said on Tuesday he would quit as a lawmaker to trigger a by-election in his parliamentary seat and would stand for re-election in that vote.

item.title: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...
item.content:encoded: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...

item.title: Apple supplier Luxshare raised ~$3.1B in its Hong Kong IPO, …
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Apple supplier Luxshare raised ~$3.1B in its Hong Kong IPO, selling 383.5M shares at ~$8 each, the top of its marketed range, and will start trading on Thursday (Bloomberg)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Apple supplier Luxshare raised ~$3.1B in its Hong Kong IPO, selling 383.5M shares at ~$8 each, the top of its marketed range, and will start trading on Thursday (Bloomberg)

item.title: Belgium’s goalkeeper said his team was shown a “lack of resp…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: Belgium’s goalkeeper said his team was shown a “lack of respect” while captain Tielemans suggested the controversy motivated them to “do our talking on the pitch.”

item.title: Today, I laid a wreath in Hyde Park to honour the 52 innocen…
item.author: Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan (@london.gov.uk)
item.description:
Today, I laid a wreath in Hyde Park to honour the 52 innocent people killed on 7 July 2005.

We honour those injured, the families who carry the loss, and the heroic emergency responders who ran towards danger that day.

London remembers. You will never be forgotten.
item.content:encoded:
Today, I laid a wreath in Hyde Park to honour the 52 innocent people killed on 7 July 2005.

We honour those injured, the families who carry the loss, and the heroic emergency responders who ran towards danger that day.

London remembers. You will never be forgotten.

item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: The U.S. hoped to reach the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time since 2002. Instead, they’re going home. ⚽️ on.wsj.com/4y9zGI4

item.title: "I don’t know about you, but Trump’s intervention in the Wor…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description:
"I don’t know about you, but Trump’s intervention in the World Cup has ruined the game for me," writes @rbreich.bsky.social.

"How can the fine athletes representing us rejoice in a victory when the president of the United States has used his political power to seek to change a referee’s call?"
item.content:encoded:
"I don’t know about you, but Trump’s intervention in the World Cup has ruined the game for me," writes @rbreich.bsky.social.

"How can the fine athletes representing us rejoice in a victory when the president of the United States has used his political power to seek to change a referee’s call?"

item.title: America didn’t just lose a World Cup match. We lost credibi…
item.author: Dr. Mar (@boldnewme.bsky.social)
item.description:
America didn’t just lose a World Cup match.

We lost credibility.

A President personally intervened with FIFA over a disciplinary decision and created the appearance that political power could influence the rules of the game.

The reputational cost was far greater than the sporting cost.
item.content:encoded:
America didn’t just lose a World Cup match.

We lost credibility.

A President personally intervened with FIFA over a disciplinary decision and created the appearance that political power could influence the rules of the game.

The reputational cost was far greater than the sporting cost.

item.title: Two retired Italian intelligence officers arrested in Rome f…
item.author: Jacopo Iacoboni (@jacopoiacoboni.bsky.social)
item.description:
Two retired Italian intelligence officers arrested in Rome for spying for Russia. 5 other potential Italian sources working for the Ministry of Defense are under investigation

When I wrote the book "Oligarchs," on the Russian infiltration of Italian intel, they called me crazy
item.content:encoded:
Two retired Italian intelligence officers arrested in Rome for spying for Russia. 5 other potential Italian sources working for the Ministry of Defense are under investigation

When I wrote the book "Oligarchs," on the Russian infiltration of Italian intel, they called me crazy

item.title: You know what USA team has won 4 World Cups and didn't need …

item.description: You know what USA team has won 4 World Cups and didn't need the president to step in and cheat for them? The Women's soccer team.
item.content:encoded: You know what USA team has won 4 World Cups and didn't need the president to step in and cheat for them? The Women's soccer team.

item.title: Four states are standing in the way of a water rights deal t…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Four states are standing in the way of a water rights deal that tribes say would help them build more housing, grow sustainable economies and better protect public health.

“It’s a fundamental human rights issue,” said one law professor.

w/ @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
Four states are standing in the way of a water rights deal that tribes say would help them build more housing, grow sustainable economies and better protect public health.

“It’s a fundamental human rights issue,” said one law professor.

w/ @kjzz.org

item.title: So it’s Trump 1, Belgium 4 – and the world rejoices. Nothing…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)

item.content:encoded: So it’s Trump 1, Belgium 4 – and the world rejoices. Nothing like failed chicanery to bring us together, is there? | Marina Hyde
